summary:
The supraspinatus muscle does not attach to the greater tubercle; it connects to the lesser tuberosity while other muscles like L infraspinatus, Teres minor, and Subscapularis do connect with the greater tubercle. Thus,
\boxed{\text{supraspinatus}}
formatted_summary:

\boxed{\text{supraspinatus}}. Answer choice: A
